prompt: Create a polished anime-style full-body fashion portrait of a young woman named elegant girl standing against a dark starry night background with a soft halo glow behind her. She has a short glossy black bob haircut with side-parted bangs, visible ears, and delicate dangling gold earrings; her face is intentionally covered by a centered soft-edged square blur censor block. She wears a romantic pale lavender and white lolita-inspired dress: sheer translucent long puff sleeves with gathered cuffs, a high sheer ruffled neckline, layered white frills across the chest, a small gold flower brooch at the collar, a purple flower corsage on one shoulder, a fitted high waist bodice with pearl buttons and small bow accents on both sides, and a voluminous flared skirt printed with subtle violet floral patterns. Her hands gently hold the sides of the skirt outward, showing the flowing layered hem and translucent fabric. Use luminous soft lighting, detailed fabric folds, delicate lace and chiffon textures, pastel colors, elegant feminine styling, high-resolution digital illustration, centered composition, vertical portrait format, dreamy celestial atmosphere, and no text.
